name: playwright-bivo-api-tests
description: Playwright API testing suite for Bijay Workspace Client Account APIs

scripts.pw:ui:userweb: playwright test --ui --project="UI user-web onboarding" --project="UI user-web parallel" --project="UI user-web link card only" --project="UI user-web FX multi-country"
scripts.test:ui: playwright test --project="UI BCR onboarding" --project="UI BCR parallel" --project="UI user-web onboarding" --project="UI user-web parallel"
scripts.test:ui:bcr: playwright test --project="UI BCR onboarding" --project="UI BCR parallel"
scripts.test:ui:userweb: playwright test --project="UI user-web onboarding" --project="UI user-web parallel"
scripts.test:ui:userweb:full: playwright test --project="UI user-web onboarding" --project="UI user-web parallel" --project="UI user-web link card only" --project="UI user-web FX multi-country"
scripts.test:ui:userweb:parallel-all: playwright test --project="UI user-web parallel" --project="UI user-web link card only" --project="UI user-web FX multi-country"
scripts.test:ui:userweb:linkcard: playwright test --project="UI user-web link card only"
scripts.capture:apis: CAPTURE_APIS=1 playwright test --no-deps --project="UI user-web parallel" "tests/ui/user-web/1.4 ui_userweb_setup_wire_payment.spec.js" "tests/ui/user-web/1.6 ui_userweb_us_transaction.spec.js" "tests/ui/user-web/1.9 ui_userweb_movemoney.spec.js"
scripts.capture:apis:linkcard: CAPTURE_APIS=1 playwright test --no-deps --project="UI user-web link card only"
scripts.capture:apis:fx: CAPTURE_APIS=1 playwright test --workers=8 --project="UI user-web FX multi-country"
scripts.k6:probe: set -a && source .env && set +a && k6 run k6/device-trust-probe.js
scripts.k6:load: set -a && source .env && set +a && k6 run -e BIVO_VUS=$(node -pe "require('./k6/phones.json').length") k6/load-test.js
scripts.k6:load:dashboard: set -a && source .env && set +a && k6 run -e BIVO_VUS=$(node -pe "require('./k6/phones.json').length") --out web-dashboard k6/load-test.js

author: Bijay
